enGB:
One of your ancestors was from Elysium, or maybe you received the blessing of a Ghaele knight at birth. Your blood sings with desire for good and great deeds, but how you will answer this call is up to you.

 Bonus  {g|Encyclopedia:Feat}Feats{/g} of the Azata Bloodline: Dodge, Improved Initiative, Iron Will, Mobility, Spell Focus: Enchantment, Weapon Finesse
Whenever you cast a {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g} of the emotion or negative emotion subschool, increase the spell's {g|Encyclopedia:DC}DC{/g} by +2.

Starting at 1st level, you can unleash a ray of sparkling motes as a standard action, targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. Against evil creatures, this ray deals 1d6 points of holy damage + 1 for every two sorcerer levels you possess. Neutral creatures take half damage from the ray, while good creatures are not damaged. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Charisma modifier.
At 3rd level, you gain resist cold 5 and resist fire 5. At 9th level, your resistances increase to 10.

At 9th level, you gain the ability to use bardic performance as a bard of your same level for a number of rounds per day equal to your sorcerer level, using any one Perform skill of your choice as your performance skill. You gain the following types of bardic performance: inspire courage, inspire greatness, and, at 15th level, inspire heroics. If you already possess bardic performance from another source, your sorcerer levels stack with your equivalent bard level for the purpose of determining your total number of performance rounds and the effects of the performances gained with this power.

At 15th level, once per day, you can assume a light form similar to that of a ghaele for 1 round per sorcerer level. In light form, you gain the incorporeal subtype. You only take half damage as long as they are magic (you take no damage from non-magic weapons and objects). Likewise, your spells deal only half damage to corporeal creatures. Positive energy, negative energy, alignment damage, and raw damage deal full damage. Spells and other effects that do not deal damage function normally.
At 20th level, your soul is one with the power of Elysium. You gain immunity to electricity, mind-affecting effects, and petrification, and DR 15/cold iron or evil.

At 3rd level, and every two levels thereafter, a sorcerer learns an additional {g|Encyclopedia:Spell}spell{/g}, derived from her bloodline. These spells are in addition to the number of spells given at new levels.

Whenever you cast a bloodrager or sorcerer spell that deals damage, add 1 point of damage per die rolled. This benefit applies only to damaging spells that belong to schools you have selected with Spell Focus or that are bloodline spells for your bloodline..
